title: Nitwits Trade Miniblocks
description: Nitwits now have trades and sell Miniblocks.
body:
![Nitwits Trade Miniblocks Logo](https://i.imgur.com/iXdB2YQ.png)

The Nitwits now have trades!

In this datapack you will be able to obtain nitwits naturally.

10% of baby villagers have a chance of becoming Nitwit and therefore having Miniblock trades.

There are 7 different types of villagers and each of them has different Miniblock trades.


A Swamp Nitwit offers Miniblocks of Mud, Mangrove, etc...

A Desert Nitwit offers Miniblocks of Sand, Cactus, etc...
![Nitwit Master trades](https://i.imgur.com/4sQrqU2.png)
